name: Ancient Warriors - Graceful Zhou Gong
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>華</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>美</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>び</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>周</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>公</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Grace of the Warring Flower - Zhou Gong
desc: You can target 1 Continuous Spell/Trap you control; send it to the GY, and if you do, add 1 "Ancient Warriors" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If your other "Ancient Warriors" monster's effect is activated (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Ancient Warriors - Graceful Zhou Gong" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can target 1 Continuous Spell/Trap you control; send it to the GY, and if you do, add 1 "Ancient Warriors" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If your other "Ancient Warriors" monster's effect is activated (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Ancient Warriors - Graceful Zhou Gong" once per turn.
eff: You can target 1 Continuous Spell/Trap you control; send it to the GY, and if you do, add 1 "Ancient Warriors" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If your other "Ancient Warriors" monster's effect is activated (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Ancient Warriors - Graceful Zhou Gong" once per turn.

action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
